title: I One-Shotted An Entire App With Claude Fable 5 (Full Breakdown)
summary: Jordan Urbs demonstrates building a complete video processing application from screenshots alone using Claude Fable 5. He evaluates both capabilities (one-shot code generation, local-first inference) and tradeoffs (2x faster token burn, subscription expiration, cost vs. alternatives).
writeup: Jordan Urbs builds a complete video processing application using Claude Fable 5, generating the code in one shot from screenshots alone. The breakdown weighs capabilities against tradeoffs: one-shot code generation and local-first inference on one side, and faster token burn (roughly 2x), subscription expiration, and cost relative to alternatives on the other. The result is a concrete look at where image-to-app generation holds up and where its economics push back.
